name: The Four Flames Oysters Harlon
recipeInstructions:
1. Salt and pepper the oysters and dredge in flour.
2. Grill the oysters on a lightly buttered grill (or sauté lightly in a heavy skillet) until browned on both sides. Set aside and keep warm.
3. In a saucepan, heat the lemon juice, A1 Steak sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and Sherry or Madeira over low heat without boiling.
4. Blend 2 tablespoons of flour with 3 tablespoons of water in a separate bowl to create a slurry. Add the slurry to the sauce to thicken it.
5. Place the oysters on a platter and pour about a spoonful of sauce on each one.
6. Briefly run the platter under the broiler to brown before serving.
